title: muellera fluvialis
intro: Muellera fluvialis, also known as the stream muellera, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Muellera fluvialis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antimicrobial agent to combat infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, decoctions, and powders, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
